message:
docs: add replay debugging guide with worked examples

Comprehensive documentation for deterministic replay debugging:
- Conceptual overview explaining why asupersync enables this
- Getting started guide for recording, saving, and replaying traces
- Advanced usage: stepping, breakpoints, state inspection, divergence handling
- Three worked examples: race condition, cancellation bug, timer interaction
- Best practices for trace management and version control
- Troubleshooting section for common issues
- Complete API reference for TraceRecorder, TraceReplayer, and related types

Updates README documentation table to include the new guide.

Closes asupersync-yzp5

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
